The '''Ithorian religion''' was based on the worship of nature. They especially worshipped "[[Mother Jungle/Legends|Mother Jungle]]," the personification of [[Ithor/Legends|their homeworld's]] world-spanning jungle. Only those who aimed to remain there for life were allowed to go into Mother Jungle.

The [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] religion was integrated into their civil society. Each Ithorian [[Ithorian Herdship|herd]] was led by a priest, who also acted as the herd's healer. The priests were all [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], as were the [[The Oracle (Ithorian)|Oracles]] who were able to hear Mother Jungle's "call" and descend to it. The high priest of the Ithorian religion was also the leader of the Ithorian nation. [[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]] and [[Relal Tawron]] were two such leaders.
